---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem statement
A clear description of the problem this feature would solve, or the gap it fills.
e.g. *"When a patient has a complex antibiotic history, the V2 form provides no way to enter it..."*

## Proposed solution
A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Affected component
- [ ] Backend API (FastAPI)
- [ ] V1 model / CatBoost pipeline
- [ ] V2 model / ARMD RandomForest pipeline
- [ ] Dosage engine
- [ ] Frontend (Next.js)
- [ ] Training pipeline
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / deployment

## Alternatives considered
Describe any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Additional context
Add any other context, mockups, or references here.
